Pansage

#0510 Liepard #0512 Simisage
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Pansage is a Grass type Pokémon introduced in Generation 5.

Pansage

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0511
Type Grass
Species Grass Monkey Pokémon
Height 0.6 m (2′00″)
Weight 10.5 kg (23.1 lbs)
Abilities 1. Gluttony
Overgrow (hidden ability)
Local № 0017 (Black/White)
0037 (Black 2/White 2)
0029 (X/Y — Central Kalos)
0077 (Legends: Z-A)

Training

EV yield 1 Speed
Catch rate 190 (24.8% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 63
Growth Rate Medium Fast

Breeding

Egg Groups Field
Gender 87.5% male, 12.5% female
Egg cycles 20 (4,884–5,140 steps)

Base stats

HP 50
210 304
Attack 53
99 225
Defense 48
90 214
Sp. Atk 53
99 225
Sp. Def 48
90 214
Speed 64
119 249
Total 316 Min Max

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

The effectiveness of each type on Pansage.

2½½½22½

22

Evolution chart

#0511
Pansage
Grass
(use Leaf Stone)
#0512
Simisage
Grass

Pansage changes

  • In Generations 5-7, Pansage has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

Black This Pokémon dwells deep in the forest. Eating a leaf from its head whisks weariness away as if by magic.
White It shares the leaf on its head with weary-looking Pokémon. These leaves are known to relieve stress.
Black 2
White 2		 It’s good at finding berries and gathers them from all over. It’s kind enough to share them with friends.
X
Omega Ruby		 It shares the leaf on its head with weary-looking Pokémon. These leaves are known to relieve stress.
Y
Alpha Sapphire		 It’s good at finding berries and gathers them from all over. It’s kind enough to share them with friends.

Pansage can only learn these moves in previous generations. It must be taught the moves in the appropriate game and then transferred to Pokémon Ultra Sun & Ultra Moon.

Cat.
Power
Acc.

Other languages

English Pansage
Japanese ヤナップ (Yanappu)
German Vegimak
French Feuillajou
Italian Pansage
Spanish Pansage
Korean 야나프 (yanapeu)
Chinese (Simplified) 花椰猴
Chinese (Traditional) 花椰猴

 

English Grass Monkey Pokémon
Japanese くさざるポケモン
German Grasaffen-Pokémon
French Pokémon Singe Herbe
Italian Pokémon Scimperba
Spanish Pokémon Mono Hierba
Korean 풀원숭이포켓몬
Chinese (Simplified) 草猴宝可梦
Chinese (Traditional) 草猴寶可夢

Name origin

chimpanzee
a species of primate
sage
a herb (referring to cooking and its Grass type)
